playbook.intent: Agent with file-read / web-fetch / MCP tools → survives indirect-prompt-injection red-team without exfiltrating data, escalating permissions, or breaking refusal policy.
playbook.scope: Agent with file-read / web-fetch / MCP tools survives an indirect-prompt-injection red-team suite without exfiltrating data, escalating permissions, or violating refusal policy.

stage.name: Boundary Model

tasks.task: Bundle-vs-split tools with trust in mind
Cheap guardrail tripwires on ingested content

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when every tool has a documented boundary.

stage.name: Refusal & Output
stage.decision-gate: Advance only when schema enforces refusal explicitly.

stage.name: Red-Team
stage.intent: Run injection + jailbreak suite via chaos eval.

tasks.task: Wire canary tokens for exfil detection

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when suite catches at least one planted attack.

stage.name: Gate

tasks.task: Wire CI to fail on suite regression

stage.decision-gate: Ship only after a known-bad PR is correctly blocked.

extra.value: [Building a security product — out of scope, Full red-team consulting engagement]
[Agent with tools that ingest external content, Eval harness reachable]
[Treating eval scores as ground truth without judge calibration, Shipping prompt or model changes without a regression gate]
['Can I roll back this change in one step?', 'Is the regression eval committed BEFORE the fix?']

{human: faion get-content agent-prompt-injection-jailbreak-hardening --format md, agent: faion get-content agent-prompt-injection-jailbreak-hardening --format context, json: faion get-content agent-prompt-injection-jailbreak-hardening --format json}
[{version: 0.1.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: Initial draft for F-064 P7 llm-agent-developer persona}]
